message:
Bump to 0.3.2

- Schema replaces pick/skip as the only way to filter fields
- Both parsers support schema, source, for-await
- createEventParser handles mixed LLM output (think tags, code fences, prose)
- multiRoot removed — JSONL support planned as format: "jsonl"
- Seeker removed from createParser (JSON parser should error on non-JSON)

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "vectorjson",
-  "version": "0.3.1",
+  "version": "0.3.2",
   "description": "O(n) WASM SIMD JSON parser for AI agents — stream fields instantly, abort errors early, offload parsing to Workers",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
